title: Chaitanya Baghel case: Supreme Court to hear question of law; ED maintains case is infructuous
content: The ₹2,000 crore liquor scam involves allegations that politicians, excise officials, and private operators manipulated the liquor trade in Chhattisgarh between 2019 and 2022

title: Why ‘Vishwaguru’ not advancing BRICS summit for diplomatic initiative on West Asia crisis: Congress
content: Congress general secretary in charge of communications, Jairam Ramesh, pointed out that the 18th annual BRICS+ Summit will take place in New Delhi under India's Presidency later this year, with Brazil, Russia, India, China, South Africa, Argentina, Egypt, Ethiopia, Saudi Arabia, Iran, and the UAE as members.

title: Parliament Budget Session LIVE: Dharmendra Pradhan says Centre committed to making education affordable
content: Nirmala Sitharaman to introduce Corporate Laws (Amendment) Bill in Lok Sabha; Union Minister of State (MoS) for Corporate Affairs Harsh Malhotra will make a statement on action taken by the Government on the previous recommendations of the Committee on Demands for Grants (2024-25)

title: Kashmiris collect donations for war-hit Iran; Iranian Embassy says 'will never forget kindness'
content: The donations have been collected, especially in Budgam and Baramulla, with a considerable population of Shias.

title: T.N. Assembly election: residents of Tiruttani constituency seek more support to improve their livelihood
content: Farmers, who recently set up a producer organisation and started growing millets, complain that they still do not have machinery needed to process the crop. Residents say work to lay a second access road to Subramaniaswami Temple is yet to be completed, with land acquisition still under way

title: Air Force staffer arrested for spying for Pakistani handlers, sharing sensitive information
content: During interrogation, the accused revealed that he had been in contact with Pakistani intelligence operatives since 2023 and was allegedly sharing confidential information in exchange for money, officials said

title: Assembly Elections LIVE updates: ECI likely to publish SIR supplementary voter list for W.B. today
content: Kerala Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan, in an interview with The Hindu, predicts the BJP will not win a seat again in the upcoming Assembly polls

title: BJP will draw a blank this time too, says Pinarayi Vijayan
content: The Kerala Chief Minister doesn’t see defections from the Left helping either the BJP or the Congress, which, according to him, is the BJP’s ‘B team’; for the State to be in step with the modern era, the Left should continue to be in govt, he argues

title: Assam Minister Nandita Gorlosa joins Congress after BJP denies ticket
content: Congress said that Ms. Gorlosa will be declared as the Congress candidate from the Haflong constituency in Assam

title: Mob tries to barge into Kuki Zo Council chairman's residence; armed men open blank fire in Manipur
content: “Some agitators also burnt tyres in Tuibong area near Churachandpur town but security forces dispersed them by firing tear gas shells,” officials said

title: Brahmin faces of Naam Tamilar Katchi in electoral fray, a shift from the past
content: Faced with stereotypes in DMK and Periyarite political circles, Seeman’s NTK has become a refuge for Brahmins who want to work for Tamil nationalism in TN

title: ‘It is necessary to create a better understanding of dolphins among communities’
content: Researcher Imran Samad’s new short film on the endangered Indian Ocean humpback dolphins of Goa draws attention to these intelligent, highly social animals

title: March 23 rollout: Centre’s 20% LPG allocation hike kicks in, but shortages persist across Kerala
content: Majority of hotels in Kerala, including community kitchens run by agencies such as Kudumbashree, remained closed due to LPG shortage

title: As Gor makes first trip as U.S. Special envoy to South Asia, Delhi watches strategic signals closely
content: United States Ambassador to India Sergio Gor’s visit to Colombo and Maldives expected to strengthen U.S. regional role, all eyes on future trips to Pakistan-Afghanistan

title: Watch: Pinarayi Vijayan interview: Congress is BJP’s ‘B-team’; Left defections won’t matter
content: The Chief Minister of Kerala opens up about the general mood ahead of the elections and the LDF’s bid for a historic third term. From outlining “Vision 2031” for modernizing the state’s education and IT sectors to heavily criticizing the Central Government for financially strangulating Kerala and denying disaster relief, the CM holds nothing back.

title: The Sattankulam custodial torture deaths of a father and son in Tamil Nadu | Explained
content: The horrific crime took place in June 2020 in Sattankulam, Thoothukudi district, Tamil Nadu, during the countrywide COVID-19 pandemic lockdown. It shocked civil society and sparked widespread protests

title: West Bengal Assembly polls 2026: AIMIM to ally to Humayun Kabir’s AJUP
content: Humayun Kabir’s AJUP has announced candidates for 149 Assembly seats including on high profile seats like Bhabanipur and Nandigram

title: 2026 Assembly elections schedule: Dates for Assam, West Bengal, Kerala, Tamil Nadu and Puducherry
content: CEC Gyanesh Kumar on March 15, 2026, announced that the 2026 State Assembly elections will take place in 824 constituencies, with approximately 17.4 crore eligible voters participating in the democratic process

title: IUML files police complaint over ‘fake FB post’ targeting Thangal
content: IUML national general secretary P.K. Kunhalikutty said that the allegations originated from a fake Facebook account

title: Two co-founders of CoinDCX crypto exchange held on charges of fraud
content: The action follows an FIR registered on March 16 at the Mumbra police station in Thane against CoinDCX co-founders Sumit Gupta, Neeraj Khandelwal and others

title: Battle for Bhabanipur: Mamata begins campaign with workers’ meet
content: In the 2026 Assembly polls, the contest has become interesting because BJP leader Suvendu Adhikari is contesting against the Chief Minister. The Assembly has seen about 47,000 electors deleted during SIR and fate of 14,000 others hanging under judicial adjudication

title: Karnataka bypolls: Fear of rebellion looms large over Congress in Davangere
content: Though KPCC president and Deputy Chief Minister D.K. Shivakumar claimed in Bengaluru that candidates’ selection for the Assembly bypoll was based on consensus and the decision was unanimous, a Congress leader and disappointed ticket aspirant for Davangere South constituency Mohammad Sadiq Pehelwan announced in Davangere that he would challenge Congress candidate Samarth as a rebel candidate

title: ‘Vidiyal Payanam’ initiative would improve during DMK 2.0 government: Tamil Nadu CM Stalin
content: In a social media post, Mr. Stalin said 897.82 crore free bus trips were undertaken on 7,712 buses till March 1 this year

title: Wangchuk returns to Ladakh after NSA revocation, calls for relief to detainees
content: He was released recently by the Centre after nearly six months in detention under the National Security Act.

title: BJD ready for legal battle to ensure 6 suspended MLAs' disqualification from Odisha Assembly
content: The suspended legislators are Chakramani Kanhar, Naba Kishor Mallick, Souvic Biswal, Subasini Jena, Ramakanta Bhoi and Devi Ranjan Tripathy

title: Opposition seeks arrest of AAP leader in Punjab
content: Congress, BJP, and SAD demand arrest of former AAP minister after warehousing corporation official’s death

title: Opposition MPs, activists oppose amendments to Transgender Persons Act
content: Public hearing in Delhi raises concerns over proposed changes to Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Act, including removal of self-perceived gender identity provision

title: Defeat of BJP must to save Assam, says citizen forum
content: The Assam Nagorik Sanmilani, which urged Raijor Dal on to join the Congress-led bloc a few days ago, says the BJP’s divisive politics have hollowed out the Assamese identity

title: Assam police camp attacked by ULFA(I), four injured
content: The assailant fired indiscriminately and lobbed several grenades at the commando camp in eastern Assam’s Tinsukia district

title: IRCTC penalises caterer for not serving tea on Duronto Express
content: ₹5,000 penalty imposed after one of the passengers lodged a complaint that the hot beverage was not provided

title: Forest Department seizes 500 kg red sanders near Gudiyatham
content: In an attempt to flee, the car sped and slipped into an open land at an isolated spot near Gudiyatham town

title: Khandre honoured in Bidar after elevation as national president of Veerashaiva Lingayat Mahasabha
content: Speaking at the function, Siddharoodha Mutt seer Shivakumar Swamiji described Mr. Khandre as a leader shaped by his virtues, combining compassion, courage and commitment to public service

title: Commercial LPG quota in Maharashtra raised by 20% on Centre’s directive
content: Priority for the additional supply will be given to hotels, dhabas, restaurants, industrial canteens, food processing industries, and the dairy sector

title: Jana Sena party aims for one lakh memberships in Srikakulam
content: Villagers were happy with the speedy development of rural areas and were coming forward to enrol their names in ‘Udyami’ membership drive, Mr. Ravikumar said

title: Welfare of handloom artisans priority for government, says Minister
content: Savitha says government is implementing several schemes to strengthen the handloom sector; subsidies on raw materials, net funds, and training in modern designs being provided and up to 90% subsidy is being offered on purchase of equipment to enhance productivity

title: Judiciary must neither be eternal critic nor cheerleader: Justice Bhuyan
content: The judge flagged the ‘reckless’ registration of criminal cases, even for student protests, memes, and social media posts, speaking at the 1st Supreme Court Bar Association National Conference

title: Assembly Elections highlights: Congress releases final list of 7 candidates for Assam Assembly polls
content: The Congress and DMK broadly agreed to share 15 seats each in the 30-member Puducherry Assembly, which goes to polls on April 9

title: NCP(SP) ‘unites’ behind Saseendran after Elathur candidate row
content: Party national working president P.C. Chacko admits there were differences over candidate selection in Elathur

title: Unable to find space for poll office owing to threats, alleges Kunhikrishnan
content: Former CPI(M) leader and rebel candidate says he was recently forced to dismantle an election office after the property owner was allegedly threatened

title: Election officials seize stainless steel utensils, saris, unaccounted cash in Vellore, nearby districts
content: The vehicle-checks follow the enforcement of Model Code of Conduct for the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections

title: From Arizona to Texas: Ranking the remaining teams in the men's Sweet 16
content: Five Big Ten teams! Upset-minded Texas! Buzzer-beaters and blowouts! Here's how the Sweet 16 teams stack up.

title: Your guide to men's March Madness Day 4: Recaps, every winner's chance to advance
content: The Sweet 16 is set. Here's how Iowa, St. John's and more teams advanced -- and their chances of doing it again.

title: Iowa takes down defending champ UF in thriller
content: Alvaro Folgueiras nailed a 3-pointer with 4.5 seconds remaining, and Iowa eliminated defending national champion Florida in the second round of the men's NCAA tournament.

title: Darling calls own shot to keep St. John's dancing
content: Dylan Darling's layup as time expired sent St. John's to its first Sweet 16 since 1999 with a 67-65 win over Kansas in the men's NCAA tournament.

title: Kentucky out with its worst tourney loss since '72
content: The Wildcats' 19-point loss in an 82-63 defeat against Iowa State was Kentucky's largest in an NCAA tournament game since 1972.

title: TCU outlasts UW in OT, heads back to Sweet 16
content: Olivia Miles had 18 points and 10 rebounds, and TCU overcame Washington for a 62-59 overtime victory Sunday night that sent the Horned Frogs to the Sweet 16 of the women's NCAA tournament for the second year in a row.

title: Booker dominates Oregon with 40 in Texas win
content: Madison Booker scored a career-high 40 points in a dazzling display of shotmaking and No. 1 Texas rolled past No. 8 Oregon 100-58.

title: Kansas' Self: No decision yet on coaching future
content: Longtime Kansas coach Bill Self said after Sunday's season-ending loss to St. John's that he has not yet made a decision about his coaching future, later adding that any decision will be based solely on his health.

title: Ohtani jersey from WBC goes for record $1.5M
content: The jersey two-way Japanese star Shohei Ohtani wore during the country's 13-0 win over Chinese Taipei in the World Baseball Classic on March 6 sold for $1,500,010 via MLB Auctions on Sunday night -- the most ever paid for a Ohtani jersey at auction.

title: Hockey world mourns loss of Wild reporter Pierce
content: Jessi Pierce, who covered the Wild as the correspondent for NHL.com for the past decade. and her three children were killed Saturday in a house fire in Minnesota.

title: 😈 Haliburton trolls Kentucky alums after ISU win
content: John Calipari, who most of Kentucky's active NBA contingent played for in Lexington, coaches Arkansas these days.

title: Women's March Madness Day 3 takeaways: How half the Sweet 16 was set
content: All the better seeds won Sunday as half the Sweet 16 was set. We broke down how each winner can keep advancing.

title: Hyo Joo Kim edges Nelly Korda for wire-to-wire Founders win
content: Hyo Joo Kim held off Nelly Korda on Sunday at Sharon Heights to complete a wire-to-wire victory in the Fortinet Founders Cup.

title: No plan, no fight: Spurs hurtling toward relegation after limp loss to Forest
content: The thousand-yard stare has become the only thing you can guarantee at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, and it is staring into the abyss of relegation.

title: Man City Carabao Cup win hints Premier League title race not over
content: Arsenal hoped to win the first of four trophies. Instead, Man City show why they cannot be overlooked.

title: Rare air: Tyler Reddick in elite club with Darlington win
content: The "Track Too Tough To Tame" tested Tyler Reddick in every way possible Sunday, and this year's top star in NASCAR naturally passed with flying colors for his fourth victory of the season.

title: 'They're not even close': Why a Giannis trade might be even more complicated this summer
content: As the Giannis trade watch enters another offseason, a rare ownership structure and financial turmoil have left opposing teams wondering: Who's in charge here?

title: NCAA tournament: Matchups, capsules for every team
content: The road to the Frozen Four is set. Here's a look at the complete schedule, plus key information on all 16 teams.

title: Kentucky's Quaintance uses manga comics to fuel recovery
content: The Kentucky forward has gotten into the hobby as a way to help time pass while he heals from injury.

title: Men's tournament odds: Michigan leapfrogs Arizona as title favorite, Purdue improves
content: Teams' odds to advance and win the men's college basketball tournament entering second day of second round.

title: Women's tournament: UConn remains favorite as UCLA's odds improve
content: Odds for each team to advance through the bracket and to win the 2026 women's college basketball championship.

title: Potential busts to avoid in 2026
content: Who does Tristan H. Cockcroft think will underachieve in 2026? We have the names to steer clear of when drafting your rosters.

title: Risers and fallers: Doncic stars, but is it time to drop Giannis?
content: Luka Doncic is on another planet, and Ayo Dosunmu and Daniss Jenkins are on the rise, but should fantasy basketball managers keep Giannis Antetokounmpo and Mikal Bridges rostered?

title: Bryson DeChambeau wins again, beats Jon Rahm in playoff
content: Bryson DeChambeau won for the second straight week by saving par on the final hole for a 6-under 65 and blistering a 3-wood from a wet lie in the rough on the par-5 18th in a playoff to set up birdie and defeat Jon Rahm at LIV Golf South Africa on Sunday.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal step up pursuit of Roma star to replace Ben White
content: Arsenal are on a quest to replace Ben White and have landed on an in-form option from AS Roma. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Bigger US strike on Iran today? Trump’s 'mild' warning as 48-hour deadline expires today
content: US President Donald Trump has issued a stark warning to Iran. He demands the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours. Failure to comply will result in severe consequences, including the obliteration of Iran's power plants. Iran has responded with its own threats. Tehran vows to target US-linked assets in the Gulf if its energy infrastructure is attacked.

title: Air Canada Express plane collides with fire truck at New York's LaGuardia Airport
content: An Air Canada Express CRJ-900 plane collided with a fire truck on Runway 4 while landing at New York's LaGuardia Airport. The incident, reported by FlightRadar24, led the FAA to halt all flights at the airport. Several injuries are feared, with more details pending.

title: Dhoni to play for CSK till 60! His 'I can try' reply sends fans into frenzy
content: Fans eagerly await MS Dhoni's IPL future, with many hoping he continues beyond 2026. When questioned about retirement, the former CSK captain offered a subtle hint, stating, "It is very difficult. It is on the way down, not on the way up. But I will try," sparking thunderous applause from the excited crowd.

title: USS Boxer enters the equation: US warship bringing jets, Marines and assault power to Middle East
content: Amidst escalating Middle East tensions, the US has deployed the powerful USS Boxer, an amphibious assault ship capable of launching F-35B jets and supporting troop landings. This vessel, part of a three-ship group carrying thousands of Marines, significantly bolsters US military presence and rapid response capabilities in the volatile region.

title: FBI warns that criminals may use home internet connection as proxy
content: The FBI warns about residential proxies, where cybercriminals exploit home and business internet networks by routing traffic through compromised devices. This allows them to hide their identity while conducting illicit activities, making innocent users appear responsible. Safeguard your devices by avoiding suspicious downloads and keeping software updated.

title: 4 Jewish community ambulances set ablaze in London; video shows burning vehicles
content: Four Jewish community ambulances were torched in Golders Green, London, in an incident police are investigating as an antisemitic hate crime. CCTV shows three suspects setting the vehicles ablaze before fleeing.  Exploding oxygen cylinders damaged nearby properties, but no injuries were reported.  Authorities are appealing for information and increasing patrols.

title: Dhurandhar Day 4 collection inches closer to Rs 700 crore
content: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has stormed the box office, raking in Rs 500 crore domestically and Rs 690 crore worldwide. Directed by Aditya Dhar, this spy thriller, a sequel to 'Dhurandhar,' captivated audiences with its gripping narrative and action. The film's impressive opening weekend and subsequent strong performance are setting new benchmarks for Bollywood.

title: Jeff Bezos' ex-wife makes another 'record-setting gift of $42 million'
content: Philanthropist Mackenzie Scott has gifted Elizabeth City State University a record $42 million, the largest per-student donation to an HBCU among her recent contributions. This significant sum, nearly triple her 2020 gift, arrives as the university launches its five-year strategic plan.

title: Why are gold prices crashing? Key levels to watch out for
content: Gold price prediction today: Gold is seeing intense selling pressure and this is likely to continue this week amid global tensions, says Manav Modi, Senior Analyst, Commodity Research at Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd.

title: Rs 11 lakh crore wiped out as Sensex crashes over 1,800 points — top reasons for fall
content: Stock market crash today: Nifty50 and BSE Sensex plunged in opening trade on Monday with oil prices continuing to remain high amid the ongoing US-Iran war. Investor sentiment continues to weaken amid escalating tensions between Iran and the US, a falling rupee, and other global concerns.

title: Pan-India spy ring busted: 50 sites under surveillance from Delhi to Kashmir; 3 arrested
content: Authorities have taken three more people into custody for allegedly filming railway stations and government offices. These individuals are accused of passing sensitive information to handlers in Pakistan. This brings the total number of suspects arrested to 18. The investigation is ongoing to trace more individuals involved in the network.

title: Samsung brings AirDrop support to Galaxy S26 series and other phones
content: Samsung's Galaxy S26 series is set to receive AirDrop compatibility via Quick Share starting March 23, enabling seamless file sharing with Apple devices. This move mirrors Google's recent integration on Pixel 10 phones. Initially launching in Korea, the feature will expand to Europe, Japan, North America, and other regions, simplifying cross-platform content exchange.

title: Gold registers worst weekly fall in 40 years, what should investors do?
content: Gold prices have plummeted to their steepest weekly fall in nearly four decades, dropping significantly from recent highs. Despite Middle East tensions, the precious metal's safe-haven appeal has waned, with broader financial factors now dominating. Analysts suggest current lower prices could offer opportunities for long-term investors, though short-term volatility persists.

title: 'Khelega hi nahi': Ashwin's blunt verdict on Arjun Tendulkar at LSG
content: Former India cricketer Ravichandran Ashwin believes Arjun Tendulkar will face significant challenges securing a spot in the Lucknow Super Giants' playing XI due to the team's formidable pace attack.  Ashwin also expressed doubt about LSG's playoff chances this season, predicting they will miss the top six.

title: 'Crisis worse than two 1970s oil shocks put together': IEA chief's big warning on Hormuz
content: The world faces an unprecedented energy crisis, a potent mix of oil and gas shocks, warns the International Energy Agency.  With infrastructure damaged and the vital Strait of Hormuz threatened, global economic stability is at risk.  The agency stresses the need for international cooperation to resolve the escalating situation and prevent widespread fuel shortages.

title: 'See ball, hit ball': Samson’s six-hitting promise puts rivals on alert
content: Chennai Super Kings celebrated their legacy with a 'Roar' event, featuring past legends like Raina and Muralitharan in an exhibition match. Newcomer Sanju Samson impressed, sharing his excitement for the IPL season and his simple batting approach. The event also saw Raina and Hayden inducted into CSK's Hall of Fame.

title: Rupee hits record low: Tumbles to 93.94 against US dollar amid Middle East tensions
content: The Indian Rupee hit a record low against the US dollar, plummeting to 93.86 amid escalating Middle East tensions and fears of disrupted energy supplies. Crude oil prices have surged over 50% this month, exacerbating the currency's weakness. Indian stock markets also experienced a significant downturn, reflecting the global economic strain.

title: AI farm startup moves 600,000 cows in one tap, hits $2B valuation
content: A New Zealand farm is revolutionizing dairy farming with Halter, a system using smart collars to guide 600 cows to milking sheds with a single tap. This technology, valued at $2 billion, leverages behavioral science and AI to monitor animal health and fertility, drastically reducing labor and costs.  It's transforming agriculture with data-driven coordination.

title: Lamborghini stunt in Bengaluru leads police to underworld figure Muthappa Rai’s son
content: A Lamborghini's pre-dawn drifting stunt on Bengaluru's MG Road has led to police scrutiny, with the high-end car traced to Ricky Rai, son of late underworld figure Muthappa Rai. Authorities have seized the vehicle and issued notices to Rai, who has yet to respond. The incident, captured on video, is being investigated for dangerous driving and other violations.

title: RCB return home carrying hope and scars, aim to rebuild identity in IPL 2026
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru finally clinched their maiden IPL title last year, but celebrations were tragically marred by a stadium stampede. After a nine-month hiatus and significant stadium upgrades, cricket returns to Chinnaswamy. RCB, now defending champions, face challenges with key player absences but aim for a balanced season, balancing title defence with future planning.

title: 'I was just a batter': All-rounder Hardik Pandya hails MI scouting system
content: Hardik Pandya revealed his journey from a dedicated batter to a top white-ball all-rounder, crediting Mumbai Indians' sharp scouting and his own relentless hard work.  He emphasised the importance of adapting and body management for aspiring cricketers.  Pandya expressed his ambition to lead MI to a record sixth IPL title, inspiring the next generation with his fearless approach.

title: Watch: US strikes Iran's Qom engine plant; before-after images reveal scale of damage
content: US Central Command released images showing the destruction of an Iranian facility producing drone and aircraft components following American airstrikes. This action occurs amidst the ongoing US-Israel and Iran conflict. French President Macron discussed strengthening Saudi air defenses and urged Iran to restore freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Top stocks to buy: Stock recommendations for this week - check list
content: Stock market recommendations: Ipca Laboratories, and Hindalco are the top stocks that Motilal Oswal Wealth Management Research Desk has picked for this week starting March 23, 2026.

title: Who is Saurabh Dubey? Ex-SRH seamer joins KKR as Akash Deep's replacement
content: Kolkata Knight Riders have reportedly signed Saurabh Dubey as a replacement for the injured Akash Deep for IPL 2026. The Vidarbha left-arm pacer, who previously trained with KKR, is yet to make his IPL debut. Dubey impressed in the 2019 ACC Emerging Teams Asia Cup, showcasing his bowling prowess.

title: Lucknow woman, lover kill mother-in-law, tamper with CCTV; held
content: A woman and her lover have been arrested for allegedly murdering her mother-in-law in Nishatganj. Police state an illicit relationship and family opposition were the motives. The duo reportedly tied the victim before strangling her. They attempted to stage the scene as a robbery. However, CCTV footage and a sniffer dog led to their apprehension.

title: Brent crude stands at $112 as Trump's ultimatum, Iran threat keep markets on edge
content: Oil prices remained volatile as traders reacted to escalating geopolitical tensions around the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump issued a 48-hour ultimatum to Iran to reopen the key shipping route, threatening to target its power infrastructure. Tehran responded with threats of striking critical infrastructure across the Middle East, further unsettling global markets.

title: 'Drop these players': Gavaskar fumes at IPL no-shows, slams ‘taking for granted’ culture
content: Sunil Gavaskar has criticized overseas players for missing early IPL 2026 matches, citing a pattern of taking franchise hospitality for granted. He urged franchises to adopt stricter policies, warning that late unavailability disrupts team planning and hinders title aspirations.  This stance reflects growing concerns within the cricketing fraternity regarding player commitment.

title: 'Pop a pill and carry on': The workplace silence on India's menstrual leave debate
content: Millions of women navigate monthly hormonal cycles impacting energy and resilience, yet modern workplaces expect consistent performance. The debate around mandatory menstrual leave in India highlights concerns about potential hiring bias versus the need for biological accommodation. Experts and individuals offer varied perspectives.

title: After Trump's warning, Iran threatens to 'completely' close Strait of Hormuz
content: Iran has threatened to completely shut the Strait of Hormuz if the US strikes its energy facilities, warning that regional energy infrastructure hosting US bases would become targets. This escalation follows President Trump's ultimatum.  The conflict has already impacted global oil prices and caused significant damage and displacement on both sides.

title: MLB trade rumours: Braves eye $340 million Padres superstar amid OF issues
content: Atlanta Braves are reportedly eyeing San Diego Padres star Fernando Tatis Jr. ahead of the 2026 season.  A potential trade package includes outfielder Mike Yastrzemski and promising prospects Didier Fuentes, Owen Murphy, and Diego Tornes. This move aims to bolster Atlanta's outfield and lineup, while San Diego could gain valuable young talent and salary relief.

title: Candace Owens speaks out after Joe Rogan call as video resurfaces
content: Candace Owens supported Joe Rogan after his comments about Erika Kirk resurfaced online. She said Rogan speaks what people already think, which is why he stays popular. The issue started from an old video where Kirk discussed serious topics. Now, the debate has shifted to free speech, public opinion, and whether such comments go too far.

title: Hardik Pandya told to step aside, ‘let Suryakumar Yadav lead’ at Mumbai Indians
content: Mumbai Indians, despite a star-studded lineup, face a captaincy dilemma ahead of IPL 2026. Former selector Kris Srikkanth suggests Suryakumar Yadav, fresh from leading India to T20 World Cup glory, could take over from Hardik Pandya to revitalize the team's fortunes. Srikkanth highlighted the unusual situation of multiple World Cup-winning captains playing under Pandya.

title: CCS recognises 'significant impact' of West Asia conflict
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi's cabinet committee on security discussed measures to diversify import sources for key sectors like chemicals and pharmaceuticals due to the West Asia conflict's global economic impact. The government is preparing short-, medium-, and long-term strategies to safeguard citizens and ensure the availability of essential goods like fertilizers and coal.

title: Jannik Sinner faces drama in Miami Open win after fan disruption
content: Jannik Sinner won his Miami Open 2026 second-round match but faced an unexpected moment when a loud fan disrupted play. Damir Dzumhur complained, and the umpire called security to handle the situation. After the match, Sinner apologized for the incident. He also matched Novak Djokovic’s record of 24 straight Masters 1000 sets and now moves to the third round.

title: Hailee Steinfeld and Josh Allen’s Malibu move sparks baby No. 2 buzz
content: Hailee Steinfeld and Josh Allen are reportedly planning to buy a large Malibu home as they prepare for their growing family. With a baby on the way, the couple is thinking long term, including life after Allen’s NFL career. Sources say they want a spacious West Coast base that fits their rising profiles and future plans together.

title: This is a ‘new dawn’ in Ladakh: Sonam Wangchuk
content:
Watch: Israel-Iran War: Drone video shows extent of damage in Dimona near nuclear research center

By
